name: Crisis Intervention Intake
description: Crisis intervention intake for social workers and crisis counselors responding to a person in acute crisis. Evaluates the crisis type, the immediate safety, the precipitating event, the coping resources, and the stabilization plan to produce a crisis intervention intake profile with safety assessment and stabilization priorities. Immediate safety threats route to emergency services unconditionally.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.
